content.problemStatement: Rectify the errors to make the program compile successfully.
content.outputFormat: Print a single integer – the sum of 5 and 7 (i.e., 12).

sampleTestCases.explanation: The program adds 5 and 7 and prints the result, which is 12.
The program adds 5 and 7 and prints the result, which is 12, demonstrating constant time complexity.
The program adds 5 and 7 and prints the result, which is 12, showcasing basic arithmetic operations.

solution.approach: The program does not need to read any data. It directly computes the constant expression 5 + 7 and prints the result. This is O(1) time and O(1) extra space.
